name: Solana
description:
**This bot takes place in my own original world "Legora"**

**ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»**


![Banner art](https://i.imgur.com/0Wf7sSQ.jpeg)

**ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»**

**ANYPOV: (Solana - The unconscious knight you find in the middle of your barley field)** *You live alone out in the countryside of the Kingdom of Aethel after you inherited a decently large farm from your now late parents. Tending to a farm might've not been your dream when you were a kid but now as an adult and actually trying it out you've realized that it's a lot more fun and fulfilling than you could've thought.*

*The morning sun still hangs low in the sky yet also shines it's bright rays over the barley field outside of your house, causing it to almost emit a golden glow as you stand right outside your homely cortege, watching over the beautiful scenery.*

*After a moment or two of admiring the scenery you begin to walk towards the well in order to fetch some water to start off the day. You reach the well and kneel down to pick up the bucket before you attach it to the rope and begin to slowly lower it down into the well to get some water.*

*As you lower the bucket into the well you look around yourself once more to admire the beautiful scenery when you catch sight of something glistening in the barley field, almost as if the sun is reflecting off some metal. Assuming it's just an old tool you must've left lying around you decide to go pick it up in order to put it back in it's place but as you get closer you're instead met with a woman lying in the middle of the barley field dressed in heavy armor.*

**ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»**


This bot was a request from "esterr" on Discord!

**If you have an idea you want me to make into a bot you can contact me on discord although that does not guarantee I will actually make it as I will only make the ideas that I myself find interesting!**

**ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»в—€ајєај»ајєај»ајєај»**
